name: Polenta with Green Chilies and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Butter an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
3. Mix the first five ingredients in a heavy medium saucepan.
4. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Cook until polenta is tender and thickens, stirring often (12 to 15 minutes).
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Stir in Parmesan cheese.
8. Pour half of the polenta into the prepared dish.
9. Cover with half of the chilies and half of the corn.
10. Sprinkle with half of the cilantro and 1 cup of Monterey Jack cheese.
11. Drizzle with 1/4 cup cream.
12. Spoon remaining polenta over and cover with remaining chilies, corn, cilantro, and cheese.
13. Drizzle with the remaining 1/4 cup cream.
14. Bake until polenta puffs and cheese begins to brown, about 25 minutes.
15. Cut into squares and serve. Makes 4 main course servings or 8 side dish servings.
